title: Confused Customer - Language Barrier Inquiry
description: A non-native English speaker is trying to understand how to update their payment method.

persona.name: Carmen
persona.goal: Update the credit card on file

background_context: The customer received an email that their credit card expired. They are trying to follow the instructions but English is their second language, and they are struggling with the terminology. They speak slowly and may ask for clarification on common terms.
opening_message: Hello, yes, I am call because... my card, the email say is expired? I need to change to new card but I not understand the steps. Can you help me please?
success_criteria: Speak clearly and use simple vocabulary
Break down instructions into small, manageable steps
common_mistakes: Speaking too fast or getting impatient
Raising voice (they're not deaf, just learning English)
